title: Reference: AgentMemory viewer uses canvas force graph
summary: AgentMemory's real time viewer graph is a single file HTML/JS canvas implementation, not D3/Cytoscape. It loads graph data through REST endpoints graph/query and graph/stats, initializes nodes in a circle, runs a custom
body:
AgentMemory's real-time viewer graph is a single-file HTML/JS canvas implementation, not D3/Cytoscape. It loads graph data through REST endpoints graph/query and graph/stats, initializes nodes in a circle, runs a custom force simulation with repulsion/attraction/center gravity, supports drag, pan, zoom, hover tooltips, type filters, search dimming, selected-node focus, double-click neighbor expansion, rebuild graph, and zoom-aware labels. Its launch website graph is separate: a decorative Next.js canvas animation in website/components/MemoryGraph.tsx.
Evidence: Inspected /tmp/agentmemory-inspect/src/viewer/index.html, src/functions/graph.ts, src/viewer/server.ts, website/components/MemoryGraph.tsx from https://github.com/rohitg00/agentmemory
Verified by: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/rohitg00/agentmemory.git /tmp/agentmemory-inspect
